objective: net realized PnL through the full strategy (entry capture + atlas X exit + miss-fallback - 1c taker fee), per (category x anchor_regime) cell, vs v1's fill_rate x offset entry-capture objective
grid: placement {240,180,120,90,60,30,20} x offset {0,1,2,3,4,5,7,10,12,15,18,20} = 84 configs/cell + v3 exact config; 1,178,772 N-config evaluations
structural_insight: Net-PnL-optimal offsets are SHALLOW: offset 1c (10 cells), 2c (13), 3c (4) -> 27/36 cells want 1-3c, opposite v1's deep 15c-for-favorites. The atlas fixed-profit exit (+X) means a deeper offset adds no exit upside, only raises the miss rate (fallback to anchor, zero improvement); a shallow bid fills reliably, captures a small consistent discount, lowers capital. v1 optimized entry-capture (wrong objective once the exit caps payoff). Winning placements: {240:12,180:8,120:6,90:5,60:5}.

per_cell.negative_roi_cells_note: ATP_MAIN r05_14, WTA_CHALL r05_14, WTA_CHALL r15_24 - net-$ winner picks shallower offset, fills more, deploys more capital for higher total $ but slightly lower ROI (Step-3 argmax-net-$ objective; atlas doctrine prefers throughput).

validation_gates.gate1_v3_reproduction: PASS - v3-repro gross $8,237 within 2% of $8,098.50 (the +1.7% is the prompt-prescribed +-5min ask fallback).
validation_gates.gate3_strict_dominance: PASS - 36/36 cells winner >= v3 (v3 in candidate set).
validation_gates.gate5_corpus_ge_v3: PASS - v4 net ROI 11.73% >= v3 10.70% (by construction).

recommendation: v4 REPLACES v3 as the deployable per-cell table (per_regime_offsets_v2.csv). Shallow offsets re-optimized on net-PnL. bid_laying_policy_v1.md updated (Section 12). Design choices flagged: winners maximize net-$ (3 cells trade ROI for throughput; switch to net-ROI argmax if capital-constrained); +-5min ask fallback lifts baseline ~1.7%.
deviations: +-5min ask fallback (prompt Step 2) when ask@placement is null: lifts the v3-repro +1.7% vs canonical v3 (within gate-1 2%); the +1.024pp improvement is apples-to-apples within v4 machinery.
Per-cell winner = argmax net-$ (Step 3), not net-ROI; 3 deep-underdog cells gain net-$ but lose ROI (deploy more capital). Corpus blended net ROI still +1.024pp.
Pre-realism: B25 0.5-0.7x not applied. Fee = flat 1c taker on marketable/miss entries, 0 on maker_resting.
